nodes.itemHTML: • vul (Vala Utility Libraries) - A set of utility libraries for Vala that add: Text stream handling (input and output), JSON serialization and deserialization, and, Archive compression and extraction.
• Peekstars9.3k - Simple animated GIF screen recorder with an easy to use interface.
• Sagestars9 - A code breaking game made for elementary OS.
• Warblestars80 - Native Linux word-guessing game built in Vala and Gtk for elementary OS.
• Korembistars2.8k - A beautiful and customizable wallpapers manager for Linux.
• graphuistars18 - Graph Visualization based on graphviz.
• Notejotstars318 - Stupidly-simple notes app.
• Vala VSCodestars29 - A plugin for Visual Studio Code that enables basic autocompletion and syntax highlighting for Vala.
• vala-language-serverstars233 - A language server that aims to provide code completion, formatting, syntax highlighting, and everything else according to the Language Server spec.

• GnuTLS - A secure communications library implementing the SSL, TLS and DTLS protocols and technologies around them. It provides a simple API to access the secure communications protocols as well as APIs to parse and write X.509, PKCS #12, and other required structures.
• Almanna ORMstars7 - The Almanna ORM for Vala/GLib.
• GSVG (GObject SVG Library) - GSVG is an effort to provide a GLib GObject implementation of W3C standard API.
• live-chartstars50 - A real-time charting library for Vala and GTK3 based on Cairo.
• Vadistars17 - An IoC Container developed in order to facilitate the usage of dependency injection for Vala developers.
• balisticastars7 - An open source ballistic simulation library. There's a complete calculator herestars41.
• vaststars9 - A project for generative modeling in Vala. Think of TensorFlow rewritten in Vala.
• libcmark-vapistars2 - Vala bindings for libcmark, the CommonMark parsing and rendering library in C.
• GXML - A GObject API for manipulating XML and a Serializable framework from GObject to XML.
• Json-GLib - Implements a full JSON parser and generator using GLib and GObject, and integrates JSON with GLib data types.
• libyaml-glibstars11 - The GLib binding of libyaml, plus a GObject builder that understands YAML.
• Akirastars5k - Native Linux App for UI and UX Design built in Vala and GTK.
• Birdfontstars349 - A font editor for creating fonts in TTF, EOT, SVG and BIRDFONT format.
• GitG - A graphical user interface for git.
• VAMM (Vinari OS Apache & MariaDB Manager) - Manages LAMP services using a GTK 3 GUI.
• Badgerstars47 - Remind yourself to not sit and stare at the screen for too long.
• Blackbox - A beautiful GTK 4 terminal.
• Flowtimestars48 - GTK4 Libadwaita Pomodoro Timer.
• geary - Geary is an email application built around conversations, for the GNOME 3 desktop.
• Ideogramstars94 - Emoji Picker app.
• Notes-upstars601 - Markdown notes editor & manager.
• Paper - Take notes in Markdown.
• Plannerstars2.1k - Task manager with Todoist support designed for GNU/Linux.
• Spice-upstars588 - Presentations App for the modern Linux Desktop.
• Connections - A remote desktop client for the GNOME desktop environment.
• elementary OS App Centerstars509 - Pay-what-you-can app store for elementary OS.
• Man Helperstars5 - A lightweight GTK front-end for man pages.
• Monitorstars251 - Manage processes and monitor system resources.
• SwayNotifiationCenterstars369 - A simple GTK based notification daemon for SwayWM.
• Meteo - GTK Weather app using the OpenWeatherMap API.
• EasyDocsstars6 - Quickly read developer documentation.
• Spiderstars2 - Quickly generate a HTML5 site structure.
• Valdostars38 - Create new Vala projects from templates.
• gpseq - A parallelism library for Vala and GObject.
• Ambitionstars32 - A web framework written in Vala, with the MVC pattern in mind. Kinda unmaintained (someone could refactor it to use Valum under the hood, and maybe move it to Meson 😉).
• High Score (GNOME Games) - Retro gaming application for the GNOME desktop.
• Starfishstars15 - A Gemini browser for elementary OS.
• g4music - A beautiful, fast, fluent, light weight music player written in GTK4.
• GNOME Boxes - A simple GNOME 3 application to access virtual machines.
• Vala-TMBundlestars21 - A TextMate bundle that provides Vala syntax highlighting, code completion, etc. Sublime Text 3 can also use this plugin.
• language-vala-modern - Provides Vala language support in Atom. It's a fork of the unmaintained "language-vala package".
• Vala Syntax 4 Sublime Text - A basic plugin for Sublime Text 3 that provides syntax highlighting.
• Babl - A dynamic, any to any, pixel format translation library.
• GRXstars13 - A graphics library for simple graphics displays (think 1-bit displays or Adafruit's PiTFT displays). It also includes keyboard, mouse, joystick and touchscreen input support.

• SDL2 - A cross-platform development library designed to provide low level access to audio, keyboard, mouse, joystick, and graphics hardware via OpenGL, Direct3D, and Vulkan. Bindings are included in Vala and will be available starting with Vala 0.52.
• Valumstars213 - A Web micro-framework entirely written in Vala.
• Integrity Check - Linux application written in Vala and GTK, designed to get the verification sum of a file (MD5, SHA1, SHA256) and compare to the sum of verification provided by the file creator.
• smart-asastars20 - Smart ASA PyTeal reference implementation based on ARC-20.
• Dat Project - Powerful decentralized file sharing applications built from a large ecosystem of modules. (Source Code) MIT Nodejs
• FinancePystars1.1k - A Python Finance Library that focuses on the pricing and risk-management of Financial Derivatives, including fixed-income, equity, FX and credit derivatives.

• Raknet
    • b23r0/rust-raknetstars150 — RakNet Protocol implementation by Rust
• jwavestars33 - A library for differentiable acoustic simulations
• Responsive Design - Extensive information about all aspects of responsive design to make sites that look great and work well for everyone.
• shaunsingh/moonlight.nvimstars120 - Port of VSCode's Moonlight colorscheme for Neovim, written in Lua with built-in support for native LSP, Tree-sitter and many more plugins.
• rebelot/kanagawa.nvimstars1.5k - Neovim dark colorscheme inspired by the colors of the famous painting by Katsushika Hokusai.
• rcarriga/nvim-notifystars1.6k - A fancy, configurable, notification manager for Neovim.
• Pocco81/TrueZen.nvimstars639 - Clean and elegant distraction-free writing for Neovim.
• Pocco81/HighStr.nvimstars190 - A Neovim plugin for highlighting visual selections like in a normal document editor!
• Pocco81/AutoSave.nvimstars290 - A Neovim plugin for saving your work before the world collapses or you type :qa!
• Abstract-IDE/Abstractstars110 - Abstract, The Neovim configuration to achieve the power of Modern IDE.
• vi-tality/neovitalitystars49 - A full-featured Neovim distribution, packaged with Nix Flake for easy installation and reproducibility.
• cstsunfu/.sea.nvimstars83 - A modular Neovim configuration with beautiful UI and some useful features(Pomodoro Clock, Window Number).
• Skiff Mail - Encrypted & Decentralized Email -- available on web, iOS/Android, and macOS.
• Rosefinch - Store and run SQL queries.
• Hyperstars39.4k - Terminal.
• Kapstars15.7k - Screen recorder with GIF support.
• Beakerstars6.6k - Browser with peer-to-peer web protocols.
• SpaceRadarstars1.2k - Interactive disk space and memory visualization.
• Nota - Pro writing app designed for local Markdown files.
